title: JSA advises TIL on rights issue and stake acquisition in Tulip Compression
description: TIL Limited has made a rights issue of equity shares, and has simultaneously acquired a majority stake in Tulip Compression Private Limited.JSA Advocates & Solicitors advised TIL on the rights issue and the stake acquisition.The transaction team was led by Vikram Raghani (Partner), with support from Farah Titina (Principal Associate), Tavishi Chandra (Senior Associate) and Yagnesh Sharma (Associate).The JSA capital markets team was led by Arka Mookerjee (Partner), along with Pracheta Bhattac
